name: New-PSTransportOption

options.name: -IdleTimeoutSec
options.description: Determines how long each session stays open if the remote computer does not receive any communication from the local computer. This includes the heartbeat signal. When the interval expires, the session closes.

options.name: -MaxConcurrentCommandsPerSession
options.description: Limits the number of commands that can run at the same time in each session to the specified value. The default value is 1000.

options.name: -MaxConcurrentUsers
options.description: Limits the number of users who can run commands at the same time in each session to the specified value. The default value is 5.

options.name: -MaxIdleTimeoutSec
options.description: Limits the idle time-out set for each session to the specified value. The default value is `[Int]::MaxValue` (~25 days).

options.name: -MaxMemoryPerSessionMB
options.description: Limits the memory used by each session to the specified value. Enter a value in megabytes. The default value is 1024 megabytes (1 GB).

options.name: -MaxProcessesPerSession
options.description: Limits the number of processes running in each session to the specified value. The default value is 15.

options.name: -MaxSessions
options.description: Limits the number of sessions that use the session configuration. The default value is 25.

options.name: -MaxSessionsPerUser
options.description: Limits the number of sessions that use the session configuration and run with the credentials of a given user to the specified value. The default value is 25.

options.name: -OutputBufferingMode
options.description: Determines how command output is managed in disconnected sessions when the output buffer becomes full. The acceptable values for this parameter are:

options.name: -ProcessIdleTimeoutSec
options.description: Limits the time-out for each host process to the specified value. The default value, 0, means that there is no time-out value for the process.

description: Creates an object that contains advanced options for a session configuration.
